apps.name: Nuvio Enhanced
apps.versionDescription:
# 🚀 Release v0.2.12

This release is based on the upstream **Nuvio v0.2.12**, see official release details [here](https://github.com/NuvioMedia/NuvioMobile/releases/tag/0.2.12).

---

## Variants

### Nuvio Full
This variant is similar to the official TestFlight version with unlocked Plugins and in-app Trailers.

### Nuvio Enhanced
This custom variant includes experimental features, quality-of-life improvements, and specific bug fixes not yet available in the upstream repository.

**Added Features:**
* Added Notification, Lockscreen, and Widget playback control with media metadata and artwork.
* Added a volume boost feature (up to 200%) for quieter streams.
* Added support for Live TV integrations.
* Changed the "Play" button to "Watch Again" for already-watched movies to improve tracking clarity.
* Relocated Trakt configuration into the Integrations Settings menu.
* In-app debug logs (go to Settings -> Advanced -> Debug Logs)

**Bug Fixes:**
* Fixed animated GIF support for Profile Avatars.
* Fixed animated GIF support for Stream Badge.

> **💡 Note for iOS Users:**
Since Nuvio embeds heavy media frameworks, sideloading tools like AltStore, SideStore, or Sideloadly have to manually re-sign thousands of internal components with your Apple ID certificate. If the installation progress bar looks stuck, please don't close it! Just give it a few minutes to process the signing in the background, and it will install successfully. Use cable connection to speed-up sideloading process.

> **💡 Note for Android Users:** Unsigned debug APKs are included in the assets below if you want to test the Enhanced features on Android. You may not able to install this apk because it's unsigned. Android apk is significantly bigger because of libmpv engine integration.

---

## 📥 Downloads

| Variant | Platform | Architecture | File |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Nuvio Full** | iOS | Universal | [Nuvio-v0.2.12-Full.ipa](https://github.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/releases/download/0.2.12/Nuvio-v0.2.12-Full.ipa) |
| **Nuvio Enhanced** | iOS | Universal | [Nuvio-v0.2.12-Enhanced.ipa](https://github.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/releases/download/0.2.12/Nuvio-v0.2.12-Enhanced.ipa) |
| **Nuvio Enhanced** | Android | Universal | [Nuvio-v0.2.12-Enhanced.apk](https://github.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/releases/download/0.2.12/Nuvio-v0.2.12-Enhanced.apk) |
apps.localizedDescription: Nuvio Enhanced includes exclusive experimental features, volume boosting, and performance fixes not available in the upstream build.
